theme: 羊毛毡木盒微场景 15 例

items.title: 樱花拱桥
items.description: 粉色樱花树、米色拱桥和浅蓝小溪装进圆形木盒底座。
items.prompt: A miniature needle felted scene mounted on a small wooden cylindrical base, featuring a single fluffy pink cherry blossom tree with a short thick brown trunk, an arched cream-colored bridge over a small light blue stream, soft green grass surface, scattered pink petals, dreamy spring atmosphere, handcrafted wool felt diorama, visible wool fibers, shallow depth of field, soft natural light, clean white background, no text, no logo, vertical product photography --ar 3:4

items.title: 蘑菇森林小径
items.description: 三颗红白蘑菇、苔藓草地和灰色小石子小路组成童话森林。

items.title: 蘑菇精灵屋

items.title: 春日小羊牧场
